nodes.label: Battery
nodes.notes: Group 34/78 minimum for full accessory load

nodes.label: Alternator
nodes.notes: Powermaster-based unit for Holley mid-mount. No assigned part number — contact Level 7 directly. Includes external ground lug and corrected 3in pulley ratio. Self-exciting — no exciter wire needed.

nodes.label: Starter
nodes.notes: Powermaster Starter for LS from Level 7 Motorsports. 2.5kW / 3.4hp motor. 4.4:1 gear reduction. Inrush multiplier 1.1x (gear reduction).

nodes.label: Holley ECM
nodes.notes: Terminator X Max. Flat mounted under passenger seat — LED face toward door opening. Requires external 2-bar MAP: GM 12592525 + adapter 558-416.

nodes.label: LS3 Coils (x8)
nodes.notes: Factory LS3 coil packs — retained from crate engine

nodes.label: Injectors (x8)
nodes.notes: Size to be confirmed after blower selection. EV6 2-pin connector per injector.

nodes.label: DBW Throttle
nodes.notes: Drive-by-wire TB. Pedal: GM 10379038. 6-pin connector.

nodes.label: Cooling Fan
nodes.notes: ECM-controlled via PWM output. Fan-on threshold set in Holley software.

nodes.label: A/C Compressor
nodes.notes: Vintage Air Gen 5 compressor. Clutch relay controlled by ECM J1B OUT_4.

nodes.label: Wideband O2
nodes.notes: Included with Holley 550-931 kit. 5-wire Bosch connector.

nodes.label: MAP Sensor
nodes.notes: External 2-bar MAP required for boost. Adapter: Holley 558-416. 3-pin Metri-Pack.

nodes.label: AAW Fuse Panel
nodes.notes: Classic Update Series — First Design. Add 150A mega fuse on charge cable. 20 fused circuits.

nodes.label: Ignition Switch
nodes.notes: Routes through AAW harness. CRNK output feeds clutch_safety_sw before reaching starter -- T56/Bowler has no neutral safety circuit, clutch pedal switch is the start-safety interlock for this manual transmission build.

nodes.label: Dakota HDX
nodes.notes: CAN bus via BIM-EFI-1 under seat. BIM daisy-chain runs up to HDX control box here. Set Holley CAN to Racepak in software.

nodes.label: BIM-04-2 Temps
nodes.notes: 3x modules under passenger seat panel. Oil temp, trans temp, diff temp. Sensor: SEN-04-5 x3. Daisy-chained from BIM-EFI-1. Each needs unique ID assigned.

nodes.label: Accuair e+ ECU
nodes.notes: Locatedd behind cab next to ENDO-CVT USB cable from harness to TouchPad+ controller connects here.

nodes.label: Vintage Air HVAC
nodes.notes: 491210-RUA ProLine 3-knob horizontal control. Requires 246404 ECU. Refrigerant lines route under fender — not through firewall. Mounted in anodized black billet center dash bezel — see center_dash_disconnect_hvac for service connector.

nodes.label: Center Dash Disconnect — Radio
nodes.notes: Service disconnect at base of center dash sub-frame, in the 5in service pocket behind the bezel. Covers Kenwood DMX958XR power/ground/illum/VSS only — separate from HVAC disconnect so radio can be pulled without disturbing A/C wiring. Allows full bezel removal without cutting cab wiring.

nodes.label: Center Dash Disconnect — HVAC
nodes.notes: Service disconnect at base of center dash sub-frame, in the 5in service pocket behind the bezel. Covers Vintage Air 491210-RUA control head only — separate from radio disconnect for independent serviceability. Allows full bezel removal without cutting cab wiring.

nodes.label: Kenwood DMX958XR
nodes.notes: Wireless CarPlay/Android Auto. 6-ch 5V preouts. USB-C. HDMI input. 720p HD screen, LDAC, HD camera support. Same 3.3in chassis depth as DMX908S — no fitment change. Pink VSS input wired to second independent Bowler speed output for dead-reckoning nav when GPS signal is poor. Mounted in anodized black billet center dash bezel — see center_dash_disconnect for service connector.

nodes.label: Fuel Relay
nodes.notes: ECM triggers relay coil. Relay supplies power to C105 controller.

nodes.label: DW C105 Controller
nodes.notes: Dual speed controller. White trigger wire on controller, ground-side trigger on J1B OUT_3 switches low/high speed. 55% duty cycle low / 100% high.

nodes.label: DW810 Fuel Pump
nodes.notes: 810lph brushless — higher flow for boosted application. Custom hat on Boyd 6in cleanout plate. 10 AWG wiring per DW spec. Racetronix BCWS-001 bulkhead connector. C105 dual-speed controller — 68% low / 100% high.

nodes.label: Boyd Fuel Sender
nodes.notes: Updated Boyd sender for 10in tank depth. Racetronix BCWS-001 4-way bulkhead wiring connector through hat plate.

nodes.label: Accuair ENDO CVT
nodes.notes: All-in-one compressor/valve/tank unit. Proprietary Accuair harness. Dedicated 8 AWG feed from rear power block. M8 connector to e+ Connect ECU. Blue tandem wire unused in single-compressor config.

nodes.label: Accuair Valves
nodes.notes: Valve manifold — internal to ENDO CVT. Signal from e+ Connect ECU via USB connector.

nodes.label: Tail/Brake Lights
nodes.notes: Rear trunk loom. LED recommended for reduced load.

nodes.label: Power Windows
nodes.notes: Tier 2 accessory — planned

nodes.label: Heated Seats
nodes.notes: Tier 2 accessory — planned. Relay-switched ignition-keyed power. Do not ground to ECU ground block.

nodes.label: Alarm System
nodes.notes: Tier 2 accessory — planned

nodes.label: Backup Camera
nodes.notes: Tier 2 — integrate with Kenwood DMX908S rear camera input. Power from Bowler reverse output.

nodes.label: T56 Service Disconnect
nodes.notes: Mid-vehicle bulkhead connector at trans crossmember. Allows trans removal without cutting cab wiring. VSS, reverse signal, and lockout solenoid pass through here. No neutral safety circuit -- not applicable to T56/Bowler (manual transmission); see clutch_safety_sw for the actual start-safety interlock used on this build.

nodes.label: ground_block
nodes.notes: Star ground point — engine to frame, frame to body, battery negative. Critical for Dakota HDX and ECM sensor accuracy. All sensor grounds terminate here.

nodes.label: Power Block (Marine)
nodes.notes: Positive distribution block. Feeds fuse panel, ECM power feed, and accessory circuits from battery via 4/0 AWG main feed. Mounted near mid-ship battery location.

nodes.label: Fuel Pressure Sensor
nodes.notes: 100 PSI stainless sensor in 1/8 NPT port on Radium DMR-RA regulator. Wired to Terminator X Max J1A pin 25 (FUEL_P). Data broadcast via CAN to Dakota HDX through BIM-EFI-1.

nodes.label: MDB Fuse Block — Battery
nodes.notes: 3-pole sealed MIDI PDM. IP67/IP69K. Mounted near behind-the-cab battery on passenger side. Internally bussed 4 AWG input. Pole 1: ECM direct feed 40A. Pole 2: Heated seat relay 30A. Pole 3: Bowler T56 module 20A.

nodes.label: MDB Fuse Block — Engine Bay
nodes.notes: 3-pole sealed MIDI PDM. IP67/IP69K. Mounted on inner fender apron. Fed via 4 AWG from mid-ship power block. Pole 1: Dual brushless fans 80A. Pole 2: Vintage Air HVAC 40A. Pole 3: Radio/Kenwood constant feed 30A.

nodes.label: MDB Fuse Block — Rear
nodes.notes: 3-pole sealed MIDI PDM. IP67/IP69K. Mounted on rear electronics plate adjacent to C105 controller. Fed via 4 AWG short run from behind-the-cab battery. Pole 1: Accuair ENDO CVT 50A. Pole 2: DW810 fuel pump controller 30A. Pole 3: Spare — sealed with cavity plug for future expansion.

nodes.label: E-Stopp Power Disconnect
nodes.notes: Service disconnect at battery junction — de-powers E-Stopp module without disturbing panel wiring. DT 2-way — power and ground.

nodes.label: E-Stopp Module Disconnect
nodes.notes: Service disconnect at panel for E-Stopp button harness — allows button/switch wiring service without disturbing control box. Carries only the conductors in use: switch NO + COM (fail-safe wiring). LED ring and piezo speaker circuits omitted — not in use on this build.

nodes.label: E-Stopp Module
nodes.notes: Electric parking brake control box (E-Stopp ESK1). Mounted under-seat panel, passenger side front zone. Electrical only — no hydraulic fittings on module. Power: RED +12V (10A fuse recommended, min 10A source), BLACK ground — manual explicitly prohibits chassis grounding, dedicated return required, do not tie to star ground block. Ignition safety: BLUE wire to ignition switch RUN — optional but manual strongly recommends, disables engagement while vehicle is running. Status output: GREEN switched ground (max 25mA) active while engaged, routed to Dakota HDX spare input for dash indicator. Actuator: RED/BLACK control box wires connect to BROWN/BLUE actuator wires respectively — 16 AWG min, 15ft max extension. Button harness (LED ring + SPDT switch + piezo) is a separate factory pigtail — switch wired NO+COM (fail-safe). Manual explicitly prohibits coupling E-Stopp wiring with other circuits — isolated from Holley ECU power path. Exact button switch location still TBD, separate from Ring Brothers dash bezel switch panel. Retained as a module node (not just disconnect connectors) due to ENDO CVT reliability history that may require future rewiring.

nodes.label: E-Stopp Actuator
nodes.notes: Physical actuator mounted at e-brake cable. Direct-wired from estopp control box — no service disconnect, not something routinely unbolted. Control box RED to actuator BROWN, control box BLACK to actuator BLUE. 16 AWG minimum, 15ft max wire run per manual. Properly adjusted unit takes 2-3 seconds to engage/disengage.

nodes.label: Clutch Safety Switch
nodes.notes: Clutch pedal start interlock — normally-open switch, closes only when clutch pedal is fully depressed. Wired in series between ignition_sw CRNK output and starter S (signal) trigger pin, so starter solenoid only energizes when both key is in CRANK and clutch is depressed. T56/Bowler harness has no neutral safety circuit (not applicable to manual transmission) -- this switch is the actual start-safety interlock for this build. Mount location: clutch pedal bracket, lever or plunger actuated.

nodes.label: RaceWire Billet Pass-Thru — Dual
nodes.partNumber: RaceWire Solutions — Billet Battery Pass-Thru, Dual (Red/Black)

nodes.label: RaceWire Billet Pass-Thru — Single
nodes.partNumber: RaceWire Solutions — Billet Battery Pass-Thru, Single (Red)

edges.notes: Primary Starter wire (will need update once Fuse/breaker is built)
Fuel level signal from Boyd sender to Dakota HDX gauge input.
Manual recommends 10A fuse inline. 10A minimum source capacity. Dedicated return required -- do not ground to chassis.
Dedicated ground return -- manual explicitly prohibits chassis grounding for this circuit.
Ignition safety sense -- disables E-Stopp engagement while vehicle is running. Optional per manual but strongly recommended.
Switched ground status output, active while E-Stopp engaged, max 25mA. Lands on Dakota HDX spare input (relabeled ESTOPP_STATUS).
Control box RED to actuator BROWN. 16 AWG min, 15ft max per manual.
Control box BLACK to actuator BLUE. 16 AWG min, 15ft max per manual.
Crank trigger from ignition switch CRNK position to clutch safety switch input.
Crank trigger continues to starter solenoid S pin only when clutch switch closed (pedal depressed).
Battery to power Engine Bay components
